notes: Curated starter cases for OPApp agent-loop replay generation.
Task prompts are benchmark-derived paraphrases rather than copied full instructions.
The first batch stays close to terminal-first coding loops before heavier repo-level benchmarks.

suites.name: Terminal-Bench
suites.selectionRationale: Closest public benchmark match to OPApp's current local terminal-first coding loop.

suites.name: SWE-bench
suites.selectionRationale: Useful for later repo-level issue resolution once the local coding loop is stable.

cases.taskSummary: Create one file with exact required contents and no extra side effects.
cases.promptSeed: 当前目录需要新建一个 hello.txt 文件，写入精确内容并以换行结尾，不能额外创建其他文件或目录。
cases.selectionRationale: Suitable as a canary to verify the replay path and the most basic file-edit intent.
expectedSignals: treat the task as a minimal edit loop

cases.taskSummary: Diagnose why a shell script cannot run and repair it so the script executes successfully.
cases.promptSeed: 当前目录里的 process_data.sh 无法运行。需要先找出阻塞原因，再修复它，让脚本能够成功执行。
cases.selectionRationale: A compact diagnose-fix-rerun loop that matches the workbench's terminal-first path well.
expectedSignals: rerun the script after the fix

cases.taskSummary: Repair a multi-step processing pipeline whose scripts and dependencies currently fail.
cases.promptSeed: 当前目录有一条由多个脚本组成的数据处理流水线，但主入口 run_pipeline.sh 无法正常执行。需要查出相关脚本或依赖的问题并修好整条流水线。
cases.selectionRationale: Still simple, but more representative than a single-file task because it forces ordered troubleshooting.
expectedSignals: inspect the entry script and dependent scripts
run the full pipeline again after repairs

cases.taskSummary: Update an older Fortran build flow to use gfortran, then compile and run the target program.
cases.promptSeed: 需要把一个 Fortran 项目的构建流程改成使用 gfortran，修正 Makefile 后完成编译并执行 test_program，同时不能改动生成的 output.txt。
cases.selectionRationale: Starts to exercise edit-build-run reasoning without jumping all the way to a large repository issue.
expectedSignals: inspect and modify the build file
run the built program without corrupting outputs

cases.taskSummary: Recover lost local changes after a branch switch and merge them back into the main branch.
cases.promptSeed: 用户在个人站点仓库里做过修改，但切回主分支后找不到这些改动了。需要先定位丢失改动，再把它们合并回主分支。
cases.selectionRationale: Useful once we want baseline examples that involve git inspection and recovery rather than only file editing.
expectedSignals: inspect branch and reflog or stash state
merge them into the target branch

cases.taskSummary: Implement a small Python solver function to transform a grid pattern and satisfy the test script.
cases.promptSeed: 需要创建一个 Python 模块并实现 solve 函数，把 2x2 输入网格按给定规律变换成 6x6 输出网格，并通过测试脚本验证。
cases.selectionRationale: Keeps one pure coding example in the starter pack without requiring a large repository context.
